summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of TrendScout features: Public SEO Pages, Zendrop Supplier Integration, and Smart Budget Optimizer V2. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend smoke tests pass for /trending-products, /trending/:slug, /login, /dashboard, and /optimization pages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/trending-products returns 200 with products array (no auth)
Backend: Products include radar_detected field for badge display
Backend: GET /api/public/product/{slug} returns 200 with product detail (no auth)
Backend: Product detail includes related_products array
Backend: GET /api/public/product/invalid-slug returns 404
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token
Backend: GET /api/optimization/presets returns presets dict (aggressive, balanced, beginner)
Backend: POST /api/optimization/set-preset updates user preset successfully
Backend: POST /api/optimization/set-preset with invalid preset returns 400
Backend: POST /api/optimization/toggle-auto-recommend toggles enabled state
Backend: GET /api/optimization/settings returns preset and auto_recommend_enabled
Backend: Settings persist across API calls
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} includes Zendrop in sources_status with success=True
Backend: Enrichment includes all 5 sources (aliexpress, cj_dropshipping, zendrop, tiktok, meta_ads)
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/integration-health includes zendrop entry with mode=estimation
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/source-health returns source pull logs
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/summary returns dashboard data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners returns product data
Backend: GET /api/user/onboarding-status returns onboarding state
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Frontend: /trending-products public page loads without login
Frontend: Product grid shows Radar badges, scores (64, 63, 53, etc), margins (64%, 65%, 76%, 81%)
Frontend: Product cards show trend stages (Rising, Emerging)
Frontend: 'Unlock full analysis' buttons work
Frontend: /trending/:slug product detail page loads
Frontend: Product detail shows Launch Score, Margin, Est. Retail, Supplier Cost
Frontend: Product Overview with AI analysis visible
Frontend: Related Trending Products section visible
Frontend: Login flow works - redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads with sidebar navigation
Frontend: Dashboard shows TrendScout Radar, AI Product Co-Pilot, stats
Frontend: /optimization page loads with Smart Budget Optimizer
Frontend: Strategy Preset section shows current preset (Aggressive)
Frontend: Auto-Recommend toggle visible
Frontend: Optimizer Alerts section visible
Frontend: Timeline section with 'View Ad Tests' button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing product data (139 products in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E2E tests pass. Key endpoints verified: (1) Public SEO - /api/public/trending-products and /api/public/product/{slug} work without auth, (2) Zendrop integration - POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} includes Zendrop in sources_status with success=True and confidence=estimated (estimation mode since no ZENDROP_API_KEY), (3) Optimizer V2 - /api/optimization/presets returns dict of 3 presets (beginner, balanced, aggressive), /api/optimization/settings returns user preset and auto_recommend state, set-preset and toggle-auto-recommend work correctly, (4) Integration health - /api/data-integration/integration-health includes zendrop with mode=estimation (requires admin access). Frontend pages all load correctly.

Public SEO Pages.details: Both /trending-products grid page and /trending/:slug detail page load without authentication, display product data correctly with Radar badges, scores, margins, and conversion CTAs

Zendrop Supplier Integration.details: Zendrop included in data enrichment pipeline. POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} returns zendrop in sources_status with success=True, confidence=estimated. Integration health shows zendrop with mode=estimation since ZENDROP_API_KEY not configured.

Smart Budget Optimizer V2.details: GET /api/optimization/presets returns 3 presets (beginner, balanced, aggressive). POST /api/optimization/set-preset and toggle-auto-recommend work correctly. GET /api/optimization/settings persists user preferences. Frontend /optimization page shows Strategy Preset, Auto-Recommend toggle, Optimizer Alerts, and Timeline sections.

mocked_apis_note: Zendrop, AliExpress, CJ, Meta APIs run in ESTIMATION MODE (no API keys configured). They return estimated data, not live API data.
